pat.description: Classic token is used to fetch data from GitHub API
pat.label: GitHub Classic Token

calendar_full_max_years.description: Maximum number of years to fetch when using 'full' mode
calendar_full_max_years.label: Max Years (Full Mode)
calendar_full_max_years.tooltip: When calendar_year_mode is 'full', this sets the maximum number of years to fetch (starting from current year going back).

calendar_hide_legends.description: Hide the contribution level legend (Less, No contributions, etc.)
calendar_hide_legends.label: Hide Contribution Legend

calendar_hide_months.description: Hide month labels (Jan, Feb, Mar, etc.) on the top
calendar_hide_months.label: Hide Month Labels

calendar_hide_weeks.description: Hide weekday labels (Sun, Mon, Tue, etc.) on the left side
calendar_hide_weeks.label: Hide Weekday Labels

calendar_year_mode.description: Which year(s) to display in the contribution calendar
calendar_year_mode.label: Year Mode
calendar_year_mode.tooltip: Select which year(s) to display: Last Year (previous year), Current Year (this year), or Full (multiple years up to max).

code_habits.description: Code habits (hours, days of the week)
code_habits.name: Code Habits

favorite_languages_ignore_languages.description: Comma-separated list of languages to ignore
favorite_languages_ignore_languages.label: Ignore languages

favorite_languages_max_languages.label: Maximum languages
favorite_languages_max_languages.tooltip: Maximum number of programming languages to display. Languages are ordered by total bytes of code (most used first).

featured_repositories_urls.label: Repository URLs
featured_repositories_urls.tooltip: Enter repository URLs in the format 'owner/repo'. Separate multiple repositories with commas. Maximum 20 repositories can be featured.

gists_max.label: Maximum gists
gists_max.tooltip: Maximum number of gists to display. Gists are ordered by most recently created.

introduction_custom_text.description: Custom text to display before the bio
introduction_custom_text.label: Custom text
introduction_custom_text.tooltip: Optional custom text that will be displayed before the user's bio. Leave empty to only show the bio.

notable_contributions_max.label: Maximum contributions
notable_contributions_max.tooltip: Maximum number of notable contributions to display. Contributions are ordered by most recent.

people_max.label: Maximum people
people_max.tooltip: Maximum number of people to display. People are ordered by most recent interaction.

people_repository.label: Repository (only for repository type)
people_repository.tooltip: Required when type is 'repository'. Enter the repository in the format 'owner/repo'.

people_type.label: Type
people_type.tooltip: Select 'Profile' to show user followers, or 'Repository' to show repository-specific people (requires repository field).

profile.description: User profile with avatar and basic statistics
profile.name: Profile

recent_activity_max.label: Maximum activities
recent_activity_max.tooltip: Maximum number of recent activities to display. Activities are ordered by most recent.

repositories_max.label: Maximum repositories
repositories_max.tooltip: Maximum number of repositories to display. Repositories are ordered by stars (most starred first).

repository_contributors_max.label: Maximum contributors
repository_contributors_max.tooltip: Maximum number of contributors to display. Contributors are ordered by total contributions (most contributions first).

repository_contributors_repository.label: Repository
repository_contributors_repository.tooltip: Enter the repository in the format 'owner/repo'. This field is required.

sponsors_max.label: Maximum sponsors
sponsors_max.tooltip: Maximum number of sponsors to display. Sponsors are ordered by most recent.

sponsorships_max.label: Maximum sponsorships
sponsorships_max.tooltip: Maximum number of sponsorships to display. Sponsorships are ordered by most recent.

star_lists_max.label: Maximum lists
star_lists_max.tooltip: Maximum number of star lists to display. Lists are ordered by most recently created.

starred_repositories_max.label: Maximum repositories
starred_repositories_max.tooltip: Maximum number of starred repositories to display. Repositories are ordered by most recently starred.

top_repositories.description: Repositories with most stars (alias for stargazers)
top_repositories.name: Top Repositories
